TIPS.MSG: LegacyGamers GunZ Beta 2 is in BETA, meaning there are still bugs, report them to the administrators!
All Staff members speak ENGLISH only.
Report all hackers to our forum, we will get to them there, or If there is a active staff member on, whisper them.
Are you a donator? If you're, and you don't have your donation items, please post on the forum in "Donation information"
Thanks for playing, you guys are what LegacyGamers is!
Our website is located at http://legacygamers.net
